lp.t:
n. 密纹唱片
[计] 语言处理程序, 主程序员, 光笔, 线性协议, 表处理, 逻辑探头
lp.d: n. a long-playing phonograph record; designed to be played at 33.3 rpm

lpas.t: (LPA 的复数) [计] 连接装配存储区

lpds.t: [医][=lipoprotein deficient serum]缺乏脂蛋白血清

lpf.t:
[计] 程序设计自由同盟
[医] 低倍视野

lpg.t: abbr. 液化石油气（Liquefied Petroleum Gas）；液态丙烷气（Liquid Propane Gas）

lpga.t: abbr. 美国女子职业高尔夫（Ladies Professional Golf Assocotion）；液化石油气协会（Liquefied Petroleum Gas Association）

lpi.t: n. lines per inch; 每英寸行数

lpn.t: abbr. 有照实习护士（Licensed Practical Nurse）
lpn.d: n a nurse who has enough training to be licensed by a state to provide routine care for the sick

lpo.t: abbr. 伦敦爱乐乐团（London Philharmonic Orchestra）；过氧化脂质（Lipid Peroxidation）

lpq.t: abbr. line printer query 行式打印机任务探询; long playing quadraphonics 长放音时间四声道立体声（唱片），密纹四声道立体声唱片

lpr.t: abbr. lymphoproliferation 淋巴组织增生

lps.d: n a long-playing phonograph record; designed to be played at 33.3 rpm

lpt.t: [计] 行式打印机, 逻辑路径表

lpx.t: abbr. lipoprotein X 脂蛋白X; laser plasma source 激光等离子体源; Lambda Physik excimer laser 拉姆达物理准分子激光器; lipoxygenase 脂[肪]加氧酶
